---
title: "Marius Pachitariu"
title-block-banner: true
sidebar: false
toc: true
about:
  template: marquee
---

<center>
<img src="images/pachitarium.jpg" width="200px" class="responsive"></img><br>
</center>
<br>

Marius Pachitariu is a group leader at HHMI Janelia Research Campus. 

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=6v9BmeYAAAAJ&hl=en"><i class="bi bi-google"></i> google scholar</a><br> 
<a href="https://github.com/marius10p"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> marius10p</a><br> 
<a href="https://bsky.app/profile/marius10p.bsky.social"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i> marius10p</a><br>

<embed src="cvs/pachitariu.pdf#toolbar=0" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="600px" />
